common.tagline: Your virtual assistant for smart itineraries

aiSettings.title: AI Settings
aiSettings.subtitle: Provider and model used to generate trip plans
aiSettings.hint: Your preferences are saved to your account and used for future generations.

footer.copyright: © 2026 TripPlanner AI • Plan responsibly and enjoy your vacation.

generationRecovery.title: AI generation failed
generationRecovery.subtitle: Retry or choose another provider/model
generationRecovery.retryHint: Your selected settings will be saved before generating.
generationRecovery.highDemand: The model may be under high demand. Switch models or try again shortly.
generationRecovery.modelNotFound: This model is not available on the hosted NVIDIA NIM API. Choose another model from the list.
generationRecovery.invalidJson: The AI returned incomplete JSON. Try again or switch to Google Gemini for stricter schema adherence.

errors.invalidShareLink: The share link provided is invalid or corrupted.
errors.serverError: A server error occurred while generating your trip itinerary.
errors.genericError: Could not generate your trip itinerary. Please try again.
errors.transitApiFailure: Failed to contact the search API.

loading.title: Artificial Intelligence is thinking...
loading.hint: This may take 15 to 30 seconds while we structure the best realistic itinerary for you. Please wait.
loading.tip: Providing specific notes (e.g. "I prefer short walks" or "gluten restrictions") helps the AI recalibrate stop and restaurant suggestions to match your real taste!
messages: Structuring morning, afternoon and evening attractions...
Evaluating currency rates and average costs...

search.quickSubtitle: Click below to try an instant itinerary planned by our AI.
search.destination: Where do you want to go?*
search.destinationPlaceholder: E.g.: Paris, Tokyo, Natal - Brazil, Buenos Aires...
search.destinationHint: You can specify a city, country or state.
search.seasonPlaceholder: E.g.: October, Summer, Christmas, New Year's Eve...
search.seasonHint: This helps the AI adjust the ideal wardrobe and suggest season-appropriate activities.
search.notesPlaceholder: E.g.: Vegetarian/Vegan, prefer to avoid long art museums...

saved.title: My Saved Itineraries ({{count}})
saved.subtitle: Plans saved to your account for access on any device.
saved.emptyDesc: Customize and create a trip itinerary using the form above! After generation, you can save it here.
saved.fallbackTagline: Amazing AI tips on local tours, great restaurants and ideal packing.

auth.loginSubtitle: Sign in to plan and save your AI trip itineraries.
auth.signupSubtitle: Sign up to generate personalized itineraries and save them to the cloud.
auth.name: Name
auth.signupError: Could not create account. Please try again.
auth.serverError: Could not connect to server. Please try again.

trip.travelersAdjust: Adjust the number of people for an updated total group cost estimate during the {{days}} days:
trip.hotelDesc: Average recommended hotel rate for this budget profile.
trip.foodDesc: Estimated daily individual cost including light breakfast, lunch and optional dinner.
trip.transportDesc: Includes daily metro passes, local fares or ride-sharing apps.
trip.totalBudgetDesc: General baseline recommended by AI for a single traveler to comfortably enjoy this itinerary.
trip.packingDesc: Essential items suggested by our AI based on expected season and climate:
trip.climateSubtitle: Average monthly climate to plan your luggage precisely
trip.selectMonth: Select the month to see historical details:
trip.packingTip: Adapt the suggested packing items based on these average temperatures.
trip.transitSubtitle: Check active ride apps, bus/metro passes and mobility rules
trip.transitCtaDesc: Search instantly using Google Search. Discover real fares, local taxi or ride apps and the best integrated passes for your route.
trip.transitLoadingDesc: Searching ride apps, metro systems and current fares at the destination with grounded data.
trip.sourcesDesc: This search was grounded in real Google Search results for safety and up-to-date data.
trip.shareModalDesc: Send the full itinerary and interactive map to your travel partners
trip.qrDesc: Point your companions' phone camera to instantly import this itinerary on their screens.
trip.offlineDesc: This link contains the full plan in a compact offline-safe format.
trip.calendarModalDesc: Generate a universal file and add stops and schedules to your calendar.
trip.startDate: What is your departure/trip start date?
trip.startDateHint: Activities will be scheduled chronologically from this day.
trip.importHelp: How to import the generated file?
trip.googleCalendar: On desktop, go to calendar.google.com. Click Settings > Import & Export, upload this .ics file.
trip.appleCalendar: Double-click the file on Mac or open it from your iPhone/PC share options.
trip.mapSubtitle: Check suggested locations drawn on your smart route
trip.coordsDisclaimer: Coordinates generated from AI geological calculations.
trip.shareWhatsappMessage: Check out our complete trip itinerary for {{destination}} ({{days}} days). Use this link to see details, schedules, restaurants and the interactive map: {{url}}
trip.shareEmailBody:
Hi! I planned an amazing AI trip itinerary for {{destination}}. Access the stops and map via this link:

{{url}}
